title: Benchmark Knowledge File
description: JSON Schema for BABOK Analyst benchmark knowledge files. Defines structure for industry benchmark data with sourced data points.

category.description: Benchmark category name (e.g., 'Document Automation and Intelligent Document Processing')

description.description: Description of what this benchmark covers and the data sources used

data_points.description: Individual benchmark data points with metric, value, source citation, and year

metric.description: Name of the metric being benchmarked

value.description: Benchmark value including units, ranges, and context

source.description: Citation for the data source including organization name and report title

year.description: Year the data was published or collected
